message:
feat(demo-showcase): expand theme studio with live preview and editing

Theme studio major enhancements:
- Add live theme preview with instant visual feedback
- Implement theme editing UI with color pickers and property editors
- Add theme import/export functionality for custom themes
- Expand theme.rs with additional theme properties and variants
- Add CLI flag for theme studio mode

Benchmark updates:
- Fix theme_studio_bench to use updated API

The theme studio now provides a comprehensive environment for
designing, previewing, and testing custom themes before integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
